content_body:
Discover the Perfect Group Getaway with Our Side-by-Side Blue Ridge Cabin Rentals

Only 90 miles north of Atlanta, our unique side-by-side luxury cabin rentals offer the perfect blend of privacy and community for your next group getaway. Ideal for family reunions, friends, couples, and corporate retreats, these adjacent lodges provide ample space, luxurious amenities, and the convenience of staying close while celebrating the beauty of nature together.

The Unique Appeal of Side-by-Side Cabin Rentals

Imagine waking up to the serenity of the mountains, with your loved ones or colleagues just a stone's throw away, ready to embark on a day's adventure together. Our cabin rentals in Georgia close together make this dream a reality, offering unparalleled convenience for large groups. The proximity of these cabins ensures that everyone can gather effortlessly, whether for a morning coffee on the porch, a day exploring the great outdoors, or an evening of stories and glass of wine around the fireplace. 

This setup not only fosters a sense of togetherness but also provides the flexibility for individuals to retreat to their private quarters as needed. These North Georgia cabin rentals side by side offer the best of both worlds: shared spaces for making memories and private nooks for relaxation and rejuvenation.

Cabin Features and Amenities

Toccoa River Trio: Three 5-Bedroom, 5.5-Bathroom Lodges


Fallen Timber Lodge (bottom center), Riverview Lodge (top left), and The Rivers Edge (not pictured, ~1/4 mile away) 


The Rivers Edge ~ 5b/3.5b ~ Sleeps 10

Overlooking the Toccoa River with majestic mountain views as their backdrop, our trio of 5-bedroom cabins offer an idyllic escape for those seeking both beauty and adventure. Each cabin boasts multiple living areas, gourmet kitchens, and spacious decks overlooking the river and mountains. Guests can indulge in the luxury of their private hot tubs, enjoy meals outdoors with plenty of al fresco dining, bond over a game of pool or an arcade machine, and gather around the riverside fire pits.

The Rivers Edge, boasting 5-bedrooms and located ~1/4 mile down the road from Fallen Timber Lodge and Riverview Lodge, is ideal for large gatherings, featuring an octagonal outdoor deck with an outdoor fireplace just above the Toccoa River, is perfect for trout fishing, tubing, kayaking, and swimming.

With the ability to host up to 33 guests, Fallen Timber Lodge, The Rivers Edge, and Riverview Lodge even share 650' of direct river access boasting three sets of picnic tables and fire pits. These North Georgia riverfront cabins side by side, perfect for larger groups, ensure every member finds their own slice of paradise.

A Pair on Noontootla Creek: 5-Bedrooms and 2-Bedrooms


Serendipity on Noontootla Creek ~ 5b/5.5b ~ Sleeps 10


Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek ~ 2b/2b ~ Sleeps 4

For those desiring a more intimate setting, our duo on the Noontootla Creek presents a harmonious blend of rustic luxury. The 5-bedroom cabin, Serendipity, with its expansive layout and 5 King Suites, caters to larger families or groups, offering amenities like a game room, chef's kitchen, outdoor fireplace/Treehouse area, and hot tub.

Its smaller counterpart, Cherokee Sunrise, a cozy 2-bedroom, is perfect for smaller families, providing a quaint retreat next door with stunning valley and pond views and access to fishing right from the backyard. Together, these cabins offer versatile accommodations for any group size, ensuring a memorable stay amidst nature’s splendor. For the fishermen in the group, make sure to explore our partnership with North Georgia Trout Fishing and experience the thrill of catching trophy-sized rainbow and brown trout. 

Blue Ridge Activities and Things to Do

Blue Ridge offers a plethora of activities for all sizes. From hiking on the Appalachin trail and whitewater rafting to exploring charming downtown Blue Ridge with its boutique shops, gourmet restaurants, and speciality kid-friendly stores, there's something for everyone. Each set of side by side cabins is 15 minutes or less to these attractions, ensuring that guests have easy access and perfect proximity to both adventure and relaxation, making every day a new opportunity to create lasting memories.  

Guest Experiences and Testimonials

Our guests often share stories of unforgettable moments spent at our North Georgia luxury cabins—whether it's the joy of a family reunion on the river, the adventure of exploring the trails and creeks nearby, or the tranquility of mornings spent with coffee overlooking the mountains. These testimonials highlight the unique experiences made possible by the side-by-side setup of our cabins, offering both privacy and community. 

"This was my first time going to the mountains, and it was more than I expected! Riverivew Lodge is a nice and clean cabin to relax and enjoy family. Supplies were available such as garbage bags, dish detergent, and toilet tissue. There were more than enough of silverware, large serving spoons and forks, dish towels, dishes, pots, and pans. There was a lot of space and seating inside and out for our large family gathering! If we needed to contact anyone for information, Ms. Taylor was readily available. The scenery was BEAUTIFUL! We plan to come back." ~ Riverview Lodge 

"Thank you for a wonderful gathering place for our mini family reunion. We had beautiful views and weather and enjoyed watching it all from the "treehouse". We hope to be back soon!" ~ Serendipity on Noontootla Creek

Book Your Getaway Today! 

Booking your dream getaway in one of our side by side Blue Ridge cabins is just a few clicks away. Make sure to keep an eye on our Specials page for any available offers to redeem. Reserve online using the "Instant Quote" button on each cabin's webpage, or give our professional reservation specialists a call at (706) 432-2140!

The Blue Ridge Mountains beckon with the promise of unforgettable moments, and our side-by-side luxury cabin rentals are the perfect setting to bring together family, friends, or colleagues. Offering a unique blend of privacy, luxury, and shared spaces, these cabins ensure that every group getaway is filled with laughter, adventure, and the serene beauty of nature. Book your stay today and step into a world where every moment becomes a cherished memory.
title: Side By Side Cabin Rentals in Blue Ridge
